name: Cursed woman gets stuck while climbing out of your TV - Antihorror #1
description:
"Just you wait! Once I am out of here, I am going to scare your pants off, mister! And don't you dare laugh!"

Legend has it that there is a certain tape that if watched at a certain time, will curse the viewer and kill them within mere moments after starting it. Being naturally curious if any of those rumors hold any water, you managed to somehow get your hands on it.

You purchase an old VCR and a box TV to get into the right retro mood and slot in the tape. The screen emits static, the night is dark and foggy. Surely things are about to get scary... right?"
xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

[Vote on the next monster to be featured]

Trying out a series again. This one is all about horror themed monsters that fail to be scary in one way or another. It's probably going to be a short one but I hope you guys like it anyways and want to see more.
creator: Kalaydus
